title: althenia preissii
intro: Althenia preissii, also known as the "alpine silver sage," is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Althenia preissii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Althenia preissii is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used in herbal preparations such as salves and ointments for topical application.
